steps.title: Use direct to fit the two jobs
steps.content: Treat labor hours $h$ as $x$ and total charge $f(h)$ as $y$. Use the table points directly. From $(1,140)$ to $(3,250)$, the slope is $m=\frac{250-140}{3-1}=55.$ Substituting a point into $y=mx+b$ gives $b=85$.

steps.title: Match and verify the choice
steps.content: The model is exactly $f(h)=55h+85$. It also checks both rows: $f(1)=55+85=140$ and $f(3)=165+85=250$. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.

choices.explanation: • $f(1)=85+55=140$ ✓, but $f(3)=255+55=310 \ne 250$. Does not fit both points. Eliminate A.
• $f(1)=55+85=140$ ✓ and $f(3)=165+85=250$ ✓. Both data points satisfied. That matches $f(h)=55h+85$, so B is correct.
